This nutrient-rich lotion is blended with pure aloe vera, sunflower, neem, nut grass & greater galangal to keep skin soft, fair and moisturized in the sun. Also contains naturally derived zinc oxide. Protects skin with broad spectrum SPF 75 UVA/UVB sunscreen
